Welcome to Convenience Stories! Build and manage your own 24-hour convenience store empire. Start with a small shop and expand by stocking products, hiring employees, and satisfying customers. Convenience Stories

Welcome to Convenience Stories! Build and manage your own 24-hour convenience store empire. Start with a small shop and expand by stocking products, hiring employees, and satisfying customers. Earn profits to unlock new products, expand your store grid, and upgrade facilities. Compete against rival stores to achieve the highest market share and reach a coveted 5-star rating. Balance inventory management, employee assignments, and customer satisfaction to become the ultimate convenience store tycoon!

Arrow Keys: Navigate/Select | Space: Confirm/Place/Buy/Hire | Z: Expand/Unlock | Shift: Switch Views | Enter: Start | Escape: Pause | R: Restart
